title: Senator Shannon Grove (R-Bakersfield) reacted strongly to today’s Executive Order by Governor Newsom to ban new fracking permits by 2024 and his proposal to end all oil extraction

  "claims": [
    "California currently produces 460,000 barrels of oil a day.",
    "California imports three times the amount of oil it produces from foreign countries.",
    "The state consumes over 40 million gallons of gas and 10 million gallons of diesel a day.",

    "The oil industry in California supports more than 350,000 jobs."
